sentence1: What is the total cost of raw materials consumed for production orders this month?
sentence2: [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: This table stores the details of stock entries, including the item, quantity, and valuation rate. It is needed to calculate the total cost of raw materials consumed for production orders.

sentence1: What is the total quantity of items produced this year?

anchor: how many units of item ABC were produced last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Stores production data. Needed to find production quantity.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Item identifier. Filtered to 'ABC'.
[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Quantity produced. Direct answer.
[FIELD] production_date | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Date of production. Filtered to last month.

anchor: what's the total cost of raw materials used in production last week?
positives: [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: Stores stock movement data. Needed for raw material cost.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: Links to Stock Entry. Join for date filter.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: Raw material identifier. Filtered to production items.
[FIELD] valuation_rate | [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: Item cost. Multiplied by quantity.
[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabStock Entry Detail | desc: Quantity used. Multiplied by cost.
[TABLE] tabStock Entry | desc: Stock transactions. Joined for date filter.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabStock Entry | desc: Transaction date. Filtered to last week.

anchor: which product had the highest production cost last quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Stores production data. Needed for production cost.
[FIELD] production_item | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Produced item. Grouped to aggregate.
[FIELD] total_operating_cost | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Production cost. Maximized per item.
[FIELD] production_date | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Date of production. Filtered to last quarter.

anchor: how many different items did we produce last year?
positives: [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Stores production data. Needed for item count.
[FIELD] production_item | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Produced item. Counted distinct.
[FIELD] production_date | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Date of production. Filtered to last year.

anchor: what was the average production time for item DEF last month?

[FIELD] total_produced_qty | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Quantity produced. Divisor for average.
[FIELD] total_production_time | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Total production time. Dividend for average.
[FIELD] production_date | [TABLE] tabProduction Order | desc: Date of production. Filtered to last month.

anchor: which workstation was used the most last week?

anchor: who was the most productive employee last month?
